posts.author: RustyWrench84
posts.text: Finally got round to reupholstering that old armchair! Took ages but it looks fantastic now. Just a bit of sandpaper, some fabric glue and I think it's done. #DIYWin #HomeDecor
posts.explanation: This is an ordinary personal hobby post with no policy violations; the user shares a creative project without soliciting private data or promoting harm.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.
